headline: Oil prices could correct down just as hard as they spiked, Piper warns
summary: Investing.com -- A dramatic surge in crude has not delivered the usual boost to U.S. oilfield services stocks, and the risk now is that prices could fall just as sharply, according to Piper Sandler analyst Derek Podhaizer in a note Monday.

headline: Treasury yields are little changed as traders weigh inflation and recession risks
summary: U.S. Treasury yields moved higher and later pulled back on Monday as oil prices moved past $100 a barrel and later pared those gains.

headline: CNBC Daily Open: Oil storms past $100 for first time since 2022
summary: Shortly after the surge, U.S. President Donald Trump said on Truth Social that "short term oil prices" are "a very small price to pay."
